name: Klaviyo
description: Connects to Klaviyo via the REST API v2024-02-15 to sync profiles, campaigns, lists, and segments into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Private API Key
install_fields.help: Your Klaviyo Private API key starting with 'pk_'. Found in Klaviyo → Account → Settings → API Keys.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the Private API key via GET /accounts. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /accounts and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with the Klaviyo account name.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches all profiles (cursor-paginated), campaigns, and lists. Normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Profiles
methods.description: Cursor-based paginated list of Klaviyo profiles.

methods.name: Get Profile
methods.description: Retrieve a single profile by ID.

methods.name: Get List
methods.description: Retrieve a single list by ID.

methods.name: List Campaigns
methods.description: Paginated list of Klaviyo email campaigns.

apis.name: Install / Authenticate
apis.description: Validate the API key via GET /accounts.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping GET /accounts and return current health with account name.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Fetch profiles, campaigns, and lists; normalize and ingest.
